subject: Fwd: Greenwood Primary — Spring term dates & events
text:
Dear parents and carers,

A few important dates for your diary this term:

• Monday 3 March 2026 — INSET Day. School closed to pupils.
• Wednesday 12 March 2026 — World Book Day. Pupils can come dressed as their favourite book character.
• Friday 14 March 2026 — Year 4 trip to the Natural History Museum. Please return permission slips by Monday.
• Monday 17 — Friday 21 March 2026 — Parents' evenings. Sign-up sheets in reception.
• Friday 28 March 2026 — Sports Day on the school field, 10am. Parents welcome.
• Friday 4 April 2026 — Last day of spring term. School ends at 1:30pm.

We look forward to seeing you at these events.

Kind regards,
Mrs Patterson
Head Teacher
